Partnered with Fulton Schools of Engineering, Aviation Week, and Wings Club Foundation

Community Engagement (CE) - source indicates reciprocal or jointly beneficial collaboration.

Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

Partnered with Fulton Schools of Engineering, Aviation Week, and Wings Club Foundation to deliver a two-day, multi-campus aerospace convening featuring American Airlines COO David Seymour, engaging 120+ students in industry-focused learning and career exploration. Leveraged this engagement to hos...
